title: Notifier online
body: Proactive Telegram alerts wired up. You'll hear from jakeclaw on: task completions (🎯), stage transitions (🔄), achievements (🏆 A/G/E ≥ 8), Resolver red channels (🚨), and more.

title: Parallel dispatch ran
body: Aim 2/3/4/5 completed in <30s wall time. L0 GPU 79%, W0 CPU 1.88 load avg.

title: Task 2.1 iter1: E=5 mid-range
body: Full AGE: A=4 G=7 E=5. Room to grow on A once baselines normalize.

title: W0 booted — resilience OK
body: Uptime 29600655 min. State validated. Queues replayed.

title: Resilience layer online
body: Atomic writes + queues + hourly checkpoints + scheduler loop (PID 24105) + 3 resurrection hooks. Survives: network drops (queued retries), power loss (atomic + .bak + tarball restore), Telegram outages (queued), git push failures (retried).

title: Task 2.1 → stage S
body: L3 report + figure in repo; wiki draft pending publish

title: Task 2.1 → stage X
body: wall time <30s, parallel with Aims 3/4/5 prep — E=5

title: Task 2.1 → stage R
body: AGE computed A=4 G=7 E=5; liveness all green; no open issues

title: Task 2.2 → stage L
body: SMILES dataset from Task 2.1 output reused

title: Task 2.2 → stage E
body: top-20 CSV + barchart PNG + wiki draft generated

title: Task 2.2 → stage A
body: rank1=CHEMBL4541133 pv=9.52, 20 unique molecules, 3 artifacts

title: Task 2.2 → stage X
body: <10s wall time, parallel with 2.3 + 3.1 — E likely 6+

title: Task 2.2 → stage R
body: no issues, all deliverables green

title: Task 2.1 closed
body: AGE A=4 G=7 E=5. Figure in repo.

title: Task 2.2 done
body: Top-20 inhibitors: rank1 CHEMBL4541133 pv=9.52. Wiki draft ready.

title: Task 2.3 done
body: 5 PDBs annotated — 6PLF/6RIH/7S3R hold ligands (ONV/K4T/NH2 — 5Å residue shells).

title: Task 3.1 done
body: 29 PubMed papers 2024-2026 swept for PHGDH allosteric/RBD. Wiki draft ready.

title: Task 4.1 started
body: Cheaha workspace setup. SSH probe rc=0. Will resolve via Resolver if blocked.

title: Task 4.1 → stage L
body: Cheaha reachable via SSH config alias 'cheaha' (user=jakechen, id_ed25519). Modules: AutoDock_Vina 1.1.2, Miniforge3, conda env phgdh-sbdd with rdkit 2025.09.5 + obabel

title: Task 4.1 → stage E
body: Seed SMILES + PDBs rsynced; smoke-test sbatch 38256088 queued on express partition (receptor 7S3R, 3 top ligands)

title: Task 4.1 Cheaha workspace live
body: rdkit 2025.09.5 + Vina 1.1.2 + Miniforge3 on express partition. Smoke job 38256088 queued (7S3R + top-3 ligands from Task 2.2).

title: Resume summary — 4 tasks closed, 5th running
body: Closed: 2.1 (AGE 4/7/5), 2.2 (top-20), 2.3 (binding sites), 3.1 (29 papers). Active: 4.1 Cheaha smoke-dock.

title: Task 4.1 → stage A
body: Vina smoke dock OK: CHEMBL4541133 (pv 9.52) → 6RIH K4T pocket = -6.2 kcal/mol best. 4 workers, <6min wall. Ready to scale to Task 4.2 (100-ligand screen)

title: Task 4.1 → stage S
body: results + logs synced to W0 data/aim4_docking_{results,logs}/

title: Task 4.1 → stage X
body: Cheaha CPU credits used: ~2 min x 2 cores = negligible. Express partition fine for smoke.

title: Task 4.1 → stage R
body: no issues; first Cheaha dock landed. 4.2 (100-lig screen) ready to promote

title: Cheaha dock landed: -6.2 kcal/mol
body: Task 4.1 done. CHEMBL4541133 (pv 9.52) → 6RIH K4T allosteric pocket. rdkit + Vina + express partition all green. Ready for 100-ligand scale-up.
